Eric Case

Domainr

Domainr

Maker

Eric from Domainr here — thanks for the kind words, all! We launched the site ~5 years ago and have spent nights/weekends on it since. @connor hacks on it with us. @kam\_bain we are definitely not evil squatter overlords (to my knowledge), though you might want to confirm that with Zack and Connor. ;) This practice is called front-running, and we absolutely do not do it, nor would we ever consider it. We don't even own a portfolio of domains — we're product hackers, not domain squatters. @tommoor I'm a huge fan of Sqwiggle btw — it's essential when I'm working remotely from my team. Email us at ping@domai.nr (or @domainr on Twitter) if you have any questions about the service.

Laura Ward

#### What's great

I registered hormoneharmonyhq.health through Namecheap and it was the easiest part of setting up my entire business. No upsell hell at checkout, no hidden renewal prices that triple after year one, no forced add-ons. The domain management dashboard is clean and straightforward — DNS settings, nameservers, redirects, all where you'd expect them to be. When I needed to set up SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records for my email deliverability it was simple to find and configure.

#### What needs improvement

results.title: Spaceship Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

 47 views

•1 review

I Bought a .in domain from spaceship and was trying to set it up but i was not working and later found out that it was some issues with registry they tell me to submit my KYC document to the registry i did it but getting no reply from registry. it been a week and they said they can't help me since the issues is with registry.

#### What needs improvement

customer service (2)domain registration issues (5)

Report

 41 views

•1 review

I bought a domain name and paid for it. Before I even had a chance to build my website, the domain was still showing a Spaceship ad (which is already odd – why would you redirect my purchased domain to your ad?). Then, you accused me of fraud and deleted my domain. I've never encountered such a bizarre situation! [...] I recently attempted to register a .com domain through Spaceship, drawn in by their advertised promo code "COMPROS" offering a discount. Unfortunately, my experience was far from satisfactory. Despite following the instructions, the promo code failed to work, and I received an error message stating that I was using a VPN or proxy. However, I was simply using mobile data, with no VPN in use, which made this error particularly frustrating. Additionally, the domain management interface left much to be desired. I encountered multiple issues, especially when trying to update the nameservers. The process was confusing, and it took far longer than expected to resolve even simple tasks. Given the technical difficulties, poor customer experience, and the inability to utilize the promotional offer, [...] Customization

Report

 77 views

•1 review

I have purchased 2 domain from them using my credit card after successful payment and success mail they mailed me they are cancelling my orders for abuse activity i don't know what abuse here, afer it when i asked for refund they told we have authority to can't refund for a abuse order, also told you can check our terms and conditions here is it mentioned, seriously disgusting..... Such a f\\king company i ever seen.

#### What needs improvement

refund policy (1)domain registration issues (5)
